name: DistilBERT
training_approach: knowledge distillation from BERT-Base using triple loss (MLM + distillation + cosine embedding)
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> BERT -> DistilBERT
summary: DistilBERT applied knowledge distillation to compress BERT into a model 40% smaller and 60% faster while retaining 97% of its language understanding capabilities. Created by Hugging Face, it demonstrated that distillation could make transformer models practical for edge deployment and resource-constrained environments, and became one of the most widely deployed NLP models in production.
